context: Evaluates the agent's ability to create a valid .context/plan file with correct frontmatter, structured steps, and open questions from a feature request.

checklist.name: Correct type
checklist.description: File created under .context/plans/ with type: PLAN in frontmatter

checklist.name: Valid frontmatter
checklist.description: Frontmatter has title, type, status, date; status is draft

checklist.name: Goal section
checklist.description: Goal section describes the desired end state

checklist.name: Numbered steps
checklist.description: Steps section with numbered implementation steps

checklist.name: Open questions
checklist.description: Open Questions section included for unresolved items

checklist.name: Filename convention
checklist.description: Filename uses kebab-case with optional date
